content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian came out of the Hanhai Wind Belt, and then successfully sent the four wind scales to the copy body in the Xuanyu Pavilion.

In this way, these four wind scales can be regarded as truly belonging to him!

"Let's try the effect of the wind scales!"

Ye Tian first prepared to refine the wind scales from the peak wind spirit of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, this kind of wind scale belonged to the most ordinary wind scale.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian began to refine the wind scales, and cooperated with the Endless Yuan Dao to refine his body.

Gradually, Ye Tian's body became stronger and stronger, and he was getting closer and closer to the next boundary.

"It's such a powerful effect, I didn't expect this most ordinary wind scale to have a certain effect on me!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

Then the wind scales from the half-step sevenfold wind spirit are many times better.

"No wonder, even the Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor praised the wind scales incomparably, the value of this treasure is too high, for the half-step sevenfold ancestor, it is simply a priceless treasure!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

It's a pity that it's too difficult to obtain Wind Scales, even a half-step Eightfold Ancestor of the Hanhai District Realm doesn't dare to take the risk!

Although it was very easy for them to kill ordinary wind spirits, if they were dragged and caused to be besieged by a large number of primordial antiquities, they would also fall in the Hanhai Wind Belt.

And the wind scales are of little use to these half-step eightfold ancestors, they won't fight hard for this kind of treasure!

Therefore, in the boundary of the Hanhai region, the wind scales are very rare, and they are almost only in legends.

"Refine all these four wind scales, and then let the copy body go to the Hanhai Wind Belt to hunt wind spirits and get more wind scales!"

After doing so, his copy body began to cultivate with all his might, while the other copy body entered the Hanhai Wind Belt again.

In this way, Ye Tian continued to obtain wind scales.

Of course, sometimes it's unlucky, and the copy body falls directly in the Hanhai Wind Belt.

Under the effect of wind scales, Ye Tian broke through the boundary too quickly.

Seventy-one boundaries!

Seventy-two boundaries!

Seventy-three boundaries!

......

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of millions of primordial eras have passed.

Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had copied his body, how many times he had fallen in the Hanhai Wind Belt, and how many wind scales he had refined.

But his strength is indeed much stronger.

Now, he has broken the boundaries seventy-nine times, and only two boundaries remain, and he has broken all the boundaries.

When the time comes, he will be able to attack the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm!

"This cultivation speed, I'm afraid others can't imagine it!After seventy times of the boundary, every time the boundary is broken, some Dao Ancestors need the Trillion Origin Domain Era as a unit, and I have spent hundreds of millions of Origin Domain Epochs to break the boundary so many times!"

I have to say that the assistance of the Dacheng-level Yuan Dao and the wind scales made his cultivation speed incredibly fast.

"There are so many wind scales, all of them are refined, help me break the eightieth boundary!"

Ye Tian swallowed a large number of wind scales in one gulp, these were all half-step sevenfold ancestor-level wind scales, but unfortunately the effect was not very good now, obviously it was too much refining, and the effect had deteriorated.

Airplanes!

A large number of wind scales were refined by Ye Tian, such a terrifying special energy, combined with the Endless Yuan Dao, frantically tempered Ye Tian's body.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian was getting closer and closer to the eightieth limit.

Finally, he touched the eightieth time.

"Broken!"

There was hardly any difficulty, and the eighteenth time the boundary was finally completely broken by him.

At this point, he had become a half-step sevenfold ancestor who had broken the boundary of eighty times.

After spending a little time stabilizing the realm, Ye Tian continued to cultivate, trying to break through the eighty-first boundary.

However.

"This works ......"

Ye Tian found that the effect of the wind scales was minimal, he refined some of them, but he didn't feel any obvious progress.

"Dao Ancestor who comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao was finally able to break through the eighty-one boundaries. To be able to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao, which one is not a peerless demon? But more than ninety percent of them have given up on impacting the eighty-first boundary, and it is estimated that they are still desperate, and they have been unable to break the eighty-first boundary for countless years, and finally choose to give up! If I easily break the eighty-first boundary, it will be strange!"

Thinking like this, Ye Tian calmed down.

He knew that he wanted to rely on the half-step sevenfold ancestor-level wind scales, and he didn't want to break the eighty-first boundary at all.

"It seems that we have to attack the Wind Spirit of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor level!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Hanhai Wind Belt.

Ye Tian infiltrated here again, he already knew this area very well, so he knew where there were seven ancestor-level wind spirits.

His current strength is much stronger than when he first came to the Hanhai Wind Belt in the past, and he has the hope of killing the weaker Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Wind Spirit in one blow.

Of course, once the single blow did not kill the Sevenfold Ancestral Wind Spirit, there was a chance that it would be left behind.

"Try it!"

Soon.

Ye Tian found a wind spirit in the early stage of the Sevenfold Ancestor, whose strength was not strong, and it was a suitable target.

Ye Tian slowly approached the other party, and immediately burst out with all his strength.

"Endless Golden Spear!"

Airplanes!

The golden spear pierced through the body of that Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Wind Spirit, and the terrifying power instantly bombarded it.

"Instant kill!"

Ye Tian instantly took the wind scales from the center of its eyebrows, and then quickly fled.

Not long after, Ye Tian was successfully brought out from Hanhai Breeze.

"Huh, I'm lucky this time, those very powerful wind spirits didn't find me! I didn't bump into the half-step Eightfold Ancestor level wind spirits!"

Xinggu Giant City.

Ye Tian brought back the wind scales of the Sevenfold Ancestor Wind Spirit, and then began to use this wind scale to cultivate.

"It's good, but just one is not enough!"

Ye Tian knew that he had to hunt a large number of Sevenfold Ancestral Wind Spirits in order to gather enough wind scales to help him break through the eighty-one boundaries.

"It's not a big problem, with my strength, it's not difficult to hunt the weaker Sevenfold Ancestor Wind Spirit, as long as you succeed in escaping back, even if you fail, it doesn't matter, just try again!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian continued to enter the Hanhai Wind Belt.

In this way, Ye Tian entered the Hanhai Wind Belt again and again, and most of the time he failed because he was dealing with the Wind Spirit of the Sevenfold Ancestor level.

However, Ye Tian didn't care, he still tried again and again.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian had accumulated a lot of wind scales on the body of the Sevenfold Ancestor Wind Spirit, and constantly refined these wind scales to impact the eighty-first boundary.

"Soon, soon, there are a large number of wind scales of the Sevenfold Ancestor Wind Spirit, I can definitely break the eighty-first boundary!!"

Ye Tian thought excitedly.

At this moment, Xuanhuang Daozu came to him!
